name: Deploy Static Site to Pages on: push: branches: [ "main" ] # main 브랜치에 푸시될 때마다 실행 permissions: contents: read pages: write id-token: write # 동시에 여러 배포가 진행되지 않도록 설정 (안정성) concurrency: group: "pages" cancel-in-progress: false jobs: deploy: environment: name: github-pages url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }} runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4 - name: Setup Pages uses: actions/configure-pages@v4 - name: Upload artifact uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3 with: # index.html이 저장소의 어느 폴더에 있는지 지정하세요. # 루트 폴더에 있다면 '.' 를 그대로 두면 됩니다. path: '.' - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages id: deployment uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
